scripts.build: pnpm --dir app/web build && pnpm --dir app/admin build && pnpm --dir backend/express build
scripts.lint: pnpm --dir app/web lint && pnpm --dir app/admin lint && pnpm --dir backend/express lint && uv --directory backend/ai/llms-service run ruff check .
scripts.check-types: pnpm --dir app/web check-types && pnpm --dir app/admin check-types && pnpm --dir backend/express check-types
scripts.format: pnpm --dir app/web format && pnpm --dir app/admin format && pnpm --dir backend/express format && uv --directory backend/ai/llms-service run --group dev black .
scripts.format:check: pnpm --dir app/web format:check && pnpm --dir app/admin format:check && pnpm --dir backend/express format:check && uv --directory backend/ai/llms-service run --group dev black --check .
scripts.verify: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm check-types
